description: Delete an arbiter. The authenticated user must be the sole Owner in the $admin space.

arbiterDid.description: DID of the arbiter to delete.

resolverDepth.description: Maximum depth for resolving remote space members. Defaults to 3.

errors.name: ArbiterNotExists
errors.description: No arbiter with this DID exists.

errors.name: PermissionDenied
errors.description: The authenticated user does not have Owner access.

errors.name: OnlyLastOwnerCanDeleteArbiter
errors.description: There are multiple owners — remove other admins first.
